author: SantiMod
content: We aren't letting 'everyone' buy. We are letting the final few who were trying to purchase today but were not able to due to network instability. As I said earlier, while we want to be conscientious of those who purchased earlier in the week, we also want to be fair to those who were unable to purchase resulting from this instability. As a result, we have extended Poster 1 for 24 hours and are seeking to implmement some immediate alternative fixes to the RPC infrastructure so we do not encounter these problems going forward.
